summary: Why does retirement scare us? It’s not about money — it’s about the mind. Most people delay planning because the brain can’t imagine life at 75. That distance creates retirement anxiety.

chapters.label: Why Retirement Is Not a ‘Happy Goal’
The Biggest Risk: Depending on One Skill
Second Income & Side Skills That Reduce Anxiety
The 4-Step Money System (Budget, Protect, Emergency Fund, Invest)

tool.label: Real Retirement
tool.reason: Find the corpus you actually need to retire, and whether your current savings get you there.

disclaimer: This video is for educational purposes only and reflects individual opinions, not organizational advice. It is not financial or investment advice. Investments are subject to market risks. Please consult a qualified financial advisor before making any financial decisions.
